judge_reason: Description A describes a blank page with faint bleed-through text, while Description B describes specific visual elements including an embossed emblem and a legible red date stamp reading '30 JUL 10 1970'.
original_image_tags: Scan of a blank page, possibly the back of a document. Shows two hole-punch marks at the top edge and faint bleed-through text or an embossed seal from the reverse side, largely illegible. The page is otherwise blank aside from the handwritten marks and date stamp noted above.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Blank off-white document page with two black punch holes near the top, faint embossed/ghosted emblem in the center, a red handwritten mark on the right, and a purple stamp at bottom left reading “60 JUL 10 1970.”*
